task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a pricelist named 'Wholesale Plus'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo Pricelist configuration screen where the 'Pricelist Name' field is set to 'Wholesale Plus'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pricelist rule applies to 'All Products' and uses a 'Formula' based on 'Cost'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Pricelist Rule popup/screen showing 'Apply On' set to 'All Products', 'Compute Price' set to 'Formula', and 'Based on' set to 'Cost'.

task_completion.description: Verify the formula uses a -20% discount and a $5.00 surcharge
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the formula configuration fields in the Pricelist Rule showing a Discount of '-20' (%) and an Extra Fee (or Surcharge) of '5.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify a quotation is created for customer 'Azure Interior' using the 'Wholesale Plus' pricelist
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo Quotation/Sales Order screen with the Customer field set to 'Azure Interior' and the Pricelist field set to 'Wholesale Plus'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quotation includes the product 'Office Lamp' with the correctly calculated unit price of $29.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Order Lines tab in the Quotation. There should be a line item for 'Office Lamp' showing a Unit Price of '29.00'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Odoo ERP web GUI (menus, form views, list views) in a browser, not a mocked-up webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or Python scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show terminal windows, curl commands, or Python XML-RPC scripts being executed to create the records.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (Wholesale Plus, Azure Interior, 29.00) must be entered into the appropriate Odoo form fields, not written in a text editor like Notepad or Nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pricelist Name: 'Wholesale Plus'. Customer: 'Azure Interior'. Product: 'Office Lamp'. The pricelist rule must be based on 'Cost' with a '-20%' discount and '$5.00' extra fee/surcharge. The final expected unit price on the quotation for the Office Lamp is $29.00 (calculated from a base cost of $20.00 * 1.20 + $5.00).
